creator: lifanov@mail.lifanov.com
text:
Hmm, works for me with 2.2.0.0 on a clean box. Maybe we should MFC 2.2.0.0?

$ ansible -m cron -a 'user=lifanov name="check dirs" minute="0" hour="5,2" job="ls -alh > /dev/null"' 127.0.0.1
 [WARNING]: Host file not found: /usr/local/etc/ansible/hosts

 [WARNING]: provided hosts list is empty, only localhost is available

127.0.0.1 | SUCCESS => {
    "changed": true, 
    "envs": [], 
    "jobs": [
        "check dirs"
    ]
}
$ crontab -l
#Ansible: check dirs
0 5,2 * * * ls -alh > /dev/null
